title: Delicate Crispy Ethiopian Lentil Stew
description: A herbal and crispy Ethiopian dish featuring whole black peppercorns and tadka, made in a hot pot vessel, this stew is a light and flavorful option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in the hot pot vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tadka spice mix and whole black peppercorns and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rinsed lentils, salt, and water to the vessel and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Use a spoon to scoop out some of the lentil mixture and fry it in a little oil until it is crispy.
Return the crispy lentil mixture to the vessel and stir to combine.
